outputs.description: The calendar's name. MSGraphCalendar.Calendar.CanShare Whether the user has permission to share the calendar. Only the user who created the calendar can share it.
outputs.name: MSGraphCalendar.Calendar.Name

outputs.description: Whether the user can write to the calendar (true for the user who created the calendar and for a user who has been shared a calendar and granted write access). MSGraphCalendar.Calendar.ChangeKey Identifies the version of the calendar object. Every time the calendar is changed, the changeKey changes as well. This allows the exchange to apply changes to the correct version of the object. Read-only.
outputs.name: MSGraphCalendar.Calendar.CanEdit

outputs.description: The user who created or added the calendar. MSGraphCalendar.Calendar.ID The unique ID of the calendar. Read-only.
outputs.name: MSGraphCalendar.Calendar.Owner
